overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-lit dystopian urban environment. The player character ascends from a concrete stairwell, walks along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway past numerous holographic billboards, crosses a busy intersection, and climbs to an upper plaza area with open sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with industrial piping and graffiti

events.description: exits enclosed stairwell onto street level sidewalk beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs toward the street level exit

entered.detail: grey concrete walls with graffiti including a yellow skull with FUCK THE SYSTEM text
illuminated yellow sign reading NEW GET A UPGRADE mounted on wall
large yellow industrial ventilation pipes running along ceiling
grey concrete stairs ascending toward street level

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed concrete stairwell with industrial piping and graffiti. The player ascends the stairs and exits to street level, transitioning from the interior space to a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway with digital billboard wall

events.description: transitions from enclosed stairwell to covered walkway under highway overpass
passes large illuminated AVANTE billboard on left wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a roof over the sidewalk
long wall of large illuminated digital billboards displaying various advertisements including AVANTE
city street with moving traffic visible to the right of the sidewalk
multi-story concrete parking structure across the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, the scene is dominated by a wall of bright digital billboards on the left and a multi-lane road on the right. The area is illuminated by neon advertisements and street lamps, with sparse pedestrian traffic moving in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with NCART presence and side stair access

events.description: NCART police officer comes into view standing near the billboard wall
passes large Real Water billboard advertisement

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway passing various advertisements and an NCART officer

notable_agents.action: NCART police officer standing near the billboard wall facing the street
pedestrian in blue jacket ascending the side staircase

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying REAL WATER text with product imagery
concrete stairs ascending to upper level with pedestrians using them
illuminated vending machine with green neon lighting near the wall
red and white billboard with COIN OPERATOR text

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the highway overpass, the walkway features an NCART police officer standing near the wall and a side staircase where pedestrians are ascending. The billboards transition from AVANTE to Real Water and Coin Operator advertisements as the player moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with cylindrical building covered in digital screens

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection area with large circular building ahead
crosses street at yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians
turns left and begins ascending concrete stairs to upper plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and approaching stairs leading to upper plaza

notable_agents.action: white car driving through the intersection
pedestrian crossing the street ahead of the player

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped with multiple tiers of digital billboards and neon signage
large pink illuminated billboard with WATSON WHORE text
yellow striped pedestrian crossing marking the intersection
wide intersection with traffic lights and multiple road crossings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection, the scene is dominated by a massive cylindrical building covered in digital billboards. The player crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, navigating through moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic, then turns to ascend stairs toward an upper plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with stair structures and open night sky

events.description: ascends from street level to upper plaza with open sky and visible moon
moon becomes clearly visible in the clear night sky above the plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing the final stairs to reach the upper plaza level with open sky

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs ascending from street level to the elevated plaza
large industrial stair and ramp structure painted green with bright orange trim
full moon visible in the clear night sky above the plaza
trees with green foliage planted on the upper plaza level

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ascent to an elevated plaza with open sky, revealing a full moon above. The area features a distinctive green and orange industrial stair structure and scattered trees, transitioning from the dense neon-lit street to a more open elevated space with natural moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial stairwell into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban intersection that eventually opens up to a moonlit plaza. It begins by ascending a narrow concrete stairwell lined with piping and graffiti before exiting onto a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway. As the camera moves forward, the environment is defined by a wall of glowing digital billboards and the hum of a multi-lane road, passing an NCART officer and shifting advertisements for Real Water and Coin Operator. The scene then expands as the player emerges from the overpass into a wide intersection dominated by a cylindrical building covered in screens, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk through a flow of traffic. Finally, the camera turns to climb a green and orange industrial staircase, leaving the dense neon lights behind to reach an elevated plaza under the glow of a full moon.
